catalog.shortDescription: Let fate decide. Run fair and transparent raffles on-chain.
catalog.longDescription: The Raffle module allows you to host secure raffles with verifiable outcomes. Configure tickets, rewards, and participation rules.

docs.overview: Raffles enable fair prize distribution through blockchain-based randomness.
docs.mechanics:
Ticket minting

Locked raffle lifecycle

Random winner selection

Automatic reward distribution
docs.setup:
Define ticket parameters

Add reward

Launch raffle

Wait for sell-out

Draw winner
docs.pricing:
Base: 0 USDC/month, 5 USDC per raffle, 1 slot

Growth: 15 USDC/month, 0 USDC per raffle, 3 slots

Pro: 29 USDC/month, 0 USDC per raffle, 10 slots

activationInstructions.intro: Summon your community. Announce the prize. Let fate decide the victor.
steps: Wait for sell-out and Draw winner
activationInstructions.note: Module is active immediately; billing is per raffle when you create one on the Base tier.
